minor.message: buildUnsignedReport param type is the narrow 3-field shape; the projection is the only enforcement. A comment noting the narrow type is intentional would close the future-maintainer gap.

resolveModelClient silently falls back to FakeModelClient in integration mode when proxy env vars are absent; consider a hard error so misconfiguration is explicit (carry to AISDLC-512 integration glue).

suggestion.message: InferenceProxyClient uses plain HTTP for the inference.local loopback — intentional; network isolation is the boundary. Noted for auditors.

minor.message: buildUnsignedReport written-report reviewers/consensus fields not read back in the success/approved test (path executed but outputs unverified). The reconcile fix added a differentialTest-keys read-back; a reviewers/consensus read-back would further close this.
resolveModelClient integration-mode branches (valid-proxy-vars / missing-vars fallback) lack hermetic env-var unit tests (carry to AISDLC-512).

suggestion.message: The reviewer-runner anti-pollution mkdtemp assertion is somewhat tautological; the ucvg.test.ts end-to-end /tmp/.ai-sdlc check is the meaningful signal.
